resources.string: Volunteer coverage scanner. Scanning starts automatically after consent unless paused. This simulator build uses mock telemetry so the scanner flow can be tested before a physical phone is available.
Before scanning, Ask needs your consent. Participation is voluntary.
When scanning is enabled, the app will collect location, timestamps, connectivity state, and cellular radio measurements where Android exposes them.
This prototype stores data locally only. Upload and sharing are not enabled.
After consent, scanning starts automatically unless paused. You can pause scanning later or uninstall the app to stop participating.
Consent granted. You can pause scanning or uninstall the app to stop participating.
